item.title: Potato's Daily Dirties
item.description:
The above image was made by the wonderful CammyJay! They have their own channel in the deviousness discord where they share artwork and sometimes do drawings based on word prompts given by members. its a lot of fun! I has a Deviousness discord server! We do have a hard rule of no politics and/or religion. The discord is a safe space to get away from the bullshit going on. We have a bunch of areas including a SFW area, content creator area, a NSFW area and more! We have gaming fun! We have spontaneous gaming and some ping roles for people to use to get groups together based on US and EU time zones! We have movie nights on some Saturdays! So feel free to wander in and say haii! Thank you to everyone who has joined and made it such a unique and special place! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness If you have issues with link see dis: https://imgur.com/a/8GUNAz4 Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
artist of work above (aside from my signing potato on it): https://florahv.artstation.com/projects/XnL8P3 have been traveling a lot. so if anyone has united milageplus things they wont use like miles/pluspoints they wouldnt mind gifting or using for my future travel things lemme know via dm here. I am on dis now and trying to remember to linky over there too for when I post and also post the memes that get removed: https://bsky.app/profile/potatocheesmonk.bsky.social I has a post with links to all my past posts. enjoy: https://imgur.com/a/ZDA2CBe #potato #memes #dailydirties #makinmywaydowntown #holdinhandstothefrontpage
item.dc:creator: PotatoCheesMonk

item.title: Iridescent hematite - Graves Mountain
item.description: Graves Mountain (Rockhounding/Mining): Located in Lincoln County, Georgia, near Lincolnton, known for mineral collecting (rutile, kyanite) and an abandoned mine site.

item.title: The Fight To Keep Your Freedom Is Lot Easier Than Fighting To Get It Back
item.description: Your rights are being robbed from you and you are not mad enough. Cowering behind "what can be done", "there's nothing we can do" will not keep you safe. The slow dagger is increasing its pace. Know your enemies, they are your politicians and your police force. FIGHT NOW! Speaker: jonathan.n__
item.dc:creator: TheLastSpaceman

item.dc:creator: exploradoresciclos2018

item.title: Hump day funnies
item.description:
Welcome to this dump of random memes. Sometimes I make them themed, sometimes I don't. If you enjoy laughing without talking politics, getting away from the horrors of the world, or escaping reality, you’ll love following this page!
I just like romance but trying to broaden my mind. I read lots of smart books when I was in college and school but they’re honestly weird or boring.
Backfired. Should’ve given him time to read.
This really kills the fantasy side of the story but it’s hilarious
Stay petty, potatoes.
Time to call the cops
Once again, stay petty
I did this with two cats in my rental. Don’t worry, I kept it spotless. They never knew about them
Feeling a young? Have a kid guess your age. My five year old thinks I’m 59. I am not.
Makes a hilarious story
Maybe he looks cuddly
If real, this is awesome
Maybe it’s my dairy allergy
I think people who are extremely in shape without much work are just blessed genetically
Housework is just Sisyphus for adults
Humanity never changes, technology just gets better
Even on the paleo diet, depression exists?
People moved to the American plains just to get away from humans
Why do some people have to be party poopers?
Dream life
I believe there’s something in the Bible about fallow fields. I forgot because I’m not a farmer.
This is boomer? I thought it was a complaint everyone had.
Some movies are being replayed on their anniversaries in theaters. Check it out.
I’m not super into this movie (it’s good but not necessarily my cup of tea) but this is cute
This cat has a quest. What does he want?
Give your life for theirs, I guess? Be Jesus?
Although funny, why ruin that poor bride’s wedding?
Peak girl brain
This might work on a male boss
Sorry for what I said when my hormones were going nuts
Give me a piña colada and I’ll have two blocks of cheese
Why is this so true?
My grandma once ate liver and onions in front of me, swearing they were delicious. Might as well have been crickets for how grossed out I was
Getting in your biotics
Jake Peralta, is that you?
Oops, forgot I was at the church potluck
Why yes I can!
She’s just protecting you!
Probably would scream but so cute in pictures
I think this is what my husband sees when I’m having a freak out
And I thought I was soooo cool
I just throw them out
Rich people will spend their money on anything but helping the truly needy
I know what it stands for, you don’t have to tell me
I just enjoy the possibilities
Mine are getting wise to me
Where’s the problem?
She would
Oh no!
item.dc:creator: GigglySprinkleCupcake

item.title: Trump is going to LOVE the Commission on Presidential Capacity
item.dc:creator: JamieSays

item.title: When Your Little Brother is Cute and Thoughtful ...
item.description:
Pam has a little brother, who recently learned that he is actually her half-brother. So, when she came home recently she found this letter he’d written.
he also left her some of her (presumably) favorite snacks, like Chips Ahoy and Takis.
item.dc:creator: Jbelkin

item.title: GovBrief Today #438
item.description: The United States military has killed 170 people at sea since September and never shown the world a single piece of evidence of their criminality. The UN High Commissioner for Human Rights called the strikes extrajudicial killings and demanded they stop. So did the Inter-American Commission on Human Rights. The ICC's former chief prosecutor concluded they likely constitute crimes against humanity. Senators tried twice to force a vote on authorization and lost both times. The administration's response to all of it was the next missile. Interdiction once meant something. Sailors boarded vessels, documented evidence, and built cases tried in courtrooms. The four-star admiral who ran Southern Command questioned whether the strikes were legal, and Hegseth forced him into early retirement. The admiral who ordered a second missile into survivors in the water got promoted. Even if the government had evidence against every one of them, alleged drug traffickers are still entitled to due process. Call your representatives through Resistbot and 5 Calls and demand an immediate halt to Operation Southern Spear until Congress authorizes it. We've emailed 6,900+ stories over 438 straight nights. The algorithm doesn't always show them to you. Subscribe now at govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com Today on the Website (embedded links, data, image): https://go.govbrief.today/260413-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-apr13 [2] https://go.govbrief.today/garcia-bondi-contempt [3] https://go.govbrief.today/ibm-dei-penalty [4] https://go.govbrief.today/boat-total-170 [5] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-wsj-dismissed [6] https://go.govbrief.today/fbi-arrests-shot-man [7] https://go.govbrief.today/minn-probe-kindapping [8] https://go.govbrief.today/abbott-houston [9] https://go.govbrief.today/edgar-dhs [10] https://go.govbrief.today/gonzales-swalwell [11] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-mcdonalds [12] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-pope-wrong [13] https://go.govbrief.today/vance-pope-wrong [14] https://go.govbrief.today/stonewall-returned Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: A lesson in depth of focus
item.dc:creator: Huor

item.title: Gender is a Social Construct?
item.description: In today's video, I’m talking about what having multiple "Yous" existing all at once feels like. Especially from the perspective of being trans, navigating gender, and trying to exist in a world that expects you to be one consistent “thing.” Trans folks don’t have “multiple personalities.” We all present different versions of ourselves… and beauty can happen when you finally start putting those pieces together. Watch the full video here: https://youtu.be/fzQJgW4BcYc
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley
